about.heroDesc: Since 2016, we have been your reliable partner for construction machinery, trailers and equipment rental in North Rhine-Westphalia. What started as a small idea is now a company with over 1,700 rental products at 3 locations.
about.storyP1: In 2016, we founded SLT Rental with a clear vision: to make construction machinery and equipment rental simpler, faster and more customer-friendly.
about.storyP2: What started with just a few machines in Krefeld is now a company with over 1,700 rental products and locations in Krefeld, Bonn and Mülheim.
about.storyP3: Our recipe for success? Personal service, fair prices and equipment you can rely on. Whether you're a private individual with a weekend project or a construction company with a major contract – we find the right solution.
about.teamDesc: The people behind SLT Rental – personal, competent and always there for you.
about.valueCustomerDesc: Personal advice and individual solutions are at the heart of what we do.
about.valueQualityDesc: Regularly maintained equipment and reliable service.
about.valueRegionalDesc: 3 locations in NRW – always nearby with fast availability.
about.valueFlexDesc: From one day to several months – we adapt to your project.
about.whyDesc: What sets us apart? A combination of experience, service and the drive to always improve.
whyItems: Fair, transparent prices with no surprises
about.partnerDealerNote: SLT Rental is an authorized dealer for Zoomlion excavators and aerial work platforms in NRW, as well as a sales partner for Baumax construction machinery – including sales, spare parts, and repairs.
about.ctaDesc: Explore our equipment range or contact us for personal advice.

howItWorks.heroDesc: Get your rental equipment in 5 simple steps – book online, pick up on site or have it delivered.
howItWorks.step1Desc: First, select your preferred location (Krefeld, Bonn or Mülheim) and your desired rental period. The calendar shows you availability in real time.
howItWorks.step1Tip1: Weekend conditions: Fri–Mon at special prices
howItWorks.step2Desc: Browse our catalog for the right equipment. Use filters for category, working height, weight class and more.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Add your desired product to the cart, check the rental price and complete the booking. You'll receive an instant booking confirmation.
howItWorks.step3Tip1: Transparent prices with no hidden costs
howItWorks.step4Desc: After booking, you'll receive an email with all details: booking number, pickup address, opening hours and pickup checklist.
howItWorks.step4Tip2: Changes possible by phone or email (fees may apply)
howItWorks.step5Desc: Pick up your equipment at the chosen location or have it delivered directly to your construction site. Upon return, we'll check the condition together.
howItWorks.weekendTitle: 🎉 Weekend Rate: Rent More, Pay Less!
howItWorks.weekendDesc: Many products include our popular weekend rate:
howItWorks.weekendHighlight: Pick up Friday from 12:00 PM, return Monday by 8:00 AM – at special conditions!
howItWorks.weekendItem1: Applies to most construction machinery & trailers
howItWorks.b2bDesc: Register as a business customer and benefit from individual conditions, framework agreements and simplified billing.
howItWorks.b2bStep1Desc: Create a B2B account with your company details, VAT ID and accept the terms. After review by our team, your account will be activated.
howItWorks.b2bStep2Desc: In the B2B portal, you'll see your individual conditions, category discounts and customer-specific prices – automatically calculated.
howItWorks.b2bStep3Desc: Submit bulk inquiries for multiple rental items with individual periods. You'll receive a binding quote with all details.
howItWorks.b2bStep4Desc: A protocol is created upon handover. After the rental ends, the return includes a condition check and automatic invoicing.
b2bTips: Weekend Fri–Mon: special conditions (not a single rental day)
Changes possible by phone or email (fees may apply)
Credit limit & open invoices viewable in dashboard at any time
Personal contact person at your nearest location
howItWorks.reqDepositDesc: Depending on the product, a deposit is required which will be refunded upon return. The amount is shown during booking.
howItWorks.reqIdDesc: Please bring a valid German ID card, residence permit, or registration certificate (not older than 3 months). A driver's license is also required for self-propelled vehicles or trailers.
howItWorks.reqBusinessDesc: Business customers register in the B2B portal and benefit from framework agreements and simplified billing.
howItWorks.faqDesc: In our FAQ, you'll find answers to the most common questions about rental, booking, delivery and billing.

contact.heroDesc: Do you have questions about our products, booking or need personal advice? We're here for you – by phone, email or WhatsApp.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.privacy: I have read the <link>Privacy Policy</link> and agree to the processing of my data. *
contact.required: * Required fields. We usually respond within 24 hours.
contact.b2bDesc: Register in the B2B portal and benefit from framework agreements, simplified billing and personal support.

faq.heroDesc: Here you'll find answers to the most common questions about rental, booking, delivery and more.
faq.cat1Q1: What products can I rent from you?
faq.cat1A1: We offer over 1,700 products in 5 categories: Construction machinery (excavators, wheel loaders, compactors), Trailers (car, tipper, transport trailers), Aerial work platforms (scissor, telescopic, mast platforms), Event equipment (tents, stages, technology) and Drying/Heating (construction dryers, heaters, fans).
faq.cat1Q2: How long can I rent equipment?
faq.cat1A2: The minimum rental period varies by product – usually from 1 day. Long-term rentals over several weeks or months are possible and often cheaper. Feel free to ask us about special conditions.
faq.cat1A3: For many products: pick up Friday from 12:00 PM, return Monday by 8:00 AM – and you only pay one rental day! The weekend rate is calculated automatically.
faq.cat1Q4: Do I need special licenses or certifications?
faq.cat1A4: A corresponding driver's license is required for certain vehicles and trailers. We recommend training for aerial work platforms. Details can be found on the respective product page.
faq.cat2A1: Select your product, check availability for your desired period and add it to the cart. After booking, you'll receive a confirmation email with all details.
faq.cat2A2: Private customers pay at pickup (debit card, credit card, cash). B2B customers can pay by invoice after registration.
faq.cat2Q3: Do I need to pay a deposit?
faq.cat2A3: Yes, depending on the product, a deposit is required. The amount is shown during booking. The deposit is refunded upon proper return.
faq.cat2Q4: Can I cancel or change my booking?
faq.cat2A4: Yes, contact us by phone or email. Short-notice cancellations may incur fees depending on the product. Details can be found in our terms and conditions.
faq.cat3Q1: Where can I pick up the equipment?
faq.cat3A1: At our 3 locations: Krefeld (headquarters), Bonn and Mülheim an der Ruhr. Opening hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM.
faq.cat3A2: Yes! We deliver throughout NRW. Costs depend on distance and equipment. Delivery prices from €49 (up to 25km).
faq.cat3Q3: What do I need for pickup?
faq.cat3A3: Please bring a valid ID. For vehicles/trailers, the corresponding driver's license. The deposit can be paid by debit card or cash.
faq.cat3A4: Please inform us in time! Unplanned delays incur additional rental costs. Call us if you need more time.
faq.cat4Q1: What advantages do I have as a B2B customer?
faq.cat4A1: After registration, you benefit from framework agreements, invoice payment, personal contacts, simplified booking and special conditions for large projects.
faq.cat4Q2: How do I register as a B2B customer?
faq.cat4A2: Fill out the registration form in the B2B portal and upload your business registration or trade register excerpt. We'll review your information and activate your account within 1-2 business days.
faq.cat4Q3: Can I submit a project inquiry?
faq.cat4A3: Yes! In the B2B dashboard, you can submit project inquiries for larger projects. We'll create an individual quote for you.
faq.ctaDesc: No problem! Our team is happy to help – by phone, email or WhatsApp.

karriere.heroDesc: We're looking for motivated talent who want to shape the rental industry with us. Discover our current job openings and benefits.
karriere.benefitsDesc: At SLT, you can expect more than just a job – we offer a work environment where you can thrive and develop.
karriere.ctaDesc: We also welcome unsolicited applications! Simply send us your documents and tell us why you're a great fit for SLT.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: Information on the protection of your personal data in accordance with GDPR
datenschutz.s3Intro: We process your personal data when you:
datenschutz.s3Item1: visit our website (data automatically collected by the web server such as IP address, date/time, pages accessed, browser type, operating system)
datenschutz.s3Item3: enter into a rental agreement via our online shop
datenschutz.s3Item4: contact us by email, phone or post
s3Data: Contract data (e.g. rental item, period, price)
Usage data (IP address, time, pages accessed)
datenschutz.s4Title: Purposes and Legal Bases of Processing

s4Items.purpose: Based on your consent, e.g. for cookies/tracking
To protect our legitimate interests, e.g. for IT security, web statistics, marketing

datenschutz.s5Desc: We use cookies and comparable technologies on our website. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that contain certain information about you (e.g. for the functionality of the online shop, for analysis purposes or for marketing).
datenschutz.s5TechDesc: Required for the operation of the site and the shop.
datenschutz.s5AnalyticsDesc: Only with your consent on first visit (cookie banner/consent tool).
datenschutz.s5Revoke: You can revoke your consent at any time via our cookie tool or your browser settings.
datenschutz.s6Desc: When you contact us by form, email or phone, we store and process your information to handle your inquiry and for follow-up questions. The data will not be shared with third parties without your consent.
datenschutz.s7P1: For processing bookings/rental agreements, we additionally process your contract and payment data. Without this data, a contract cannot be concluded.
datenschutz.s7P2: For payment processing, we may use external payment service providers (e.g. PayPal, Stripe, Klarna). Their privacy policy applies to the processing of your data by these providers.
datenschutz.s8P1: We only share your data with third parties when this is necessary for contract fulfillment (e.g. transport providers, payment providers) or when a legal obligation exists.
datenschutz.s8P2: We work with external IT and hosting service providers who process your data only according to our instructions and on the basis of a data processing agreement (Art. 28 GDPR).
datenschutz.s9Desc: Our website may integrate third-party services (e.g. Google Maps for location display, social plugins). When accessing such content, personal data may be transferred to these providers, potentially to countries outside the EU. The privacy policies of the respective providers apply.
datenschutz.s10Desc: We store your personal data only as long as necessary to fulfill the respective purposes or as we are legally required to retain them (in particular tax and commercial retention periods).
datenschutz.s11Intro: You have the right at any time to:

s11Rights.right: access information about your personal data stored by us
revoke your consent (with effect for the future)

datenschutz.s11Contact: Please direct your request to the contact address mentioned above. You also have the right to file a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
datenschutz.s12Desc: We take technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction or access by unauthorized persons. Our security measures are continuously improved in line with technological developments.
datenschutz.s13Desc: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy at any time, e.g. in the event of changes to laws, our website or our services.

agbText.heading: General Terms and Conditions of Rental of SLT Technology Group GmbH & Co. KG and the registered brand 'SLT-Rental' – As of: January 2026
agbText.footer: As of: January 2026 · SLT Technology Group GmbH & Co. KG · Krefeld

i.title: I. Scope and Contracting Parties
i.p1: These General Terms and Conditions of Rental ('GTC') apply exclusively to all rental agreements between SLT Technology Group GmbH & Co. KG ('SLT') and the lessee. Conflicting terms and conditions of the lessee are not recognised unless SLT expressly agrees to them in writing.
i.p2: Amendments or deviations from these GTC must be made in writing. The contractual language is German.
i.p3: Should individual provisions of these GTC be invalid, this shall not affect the validity of the remaining provisions. The invalid provision shall be replaced by one that most closely reflects its economic purpose.

ii.title: II. Subject Matter and Conclusion of Contract
ii.2_1: Rental Items: SLT rents out construction machinery, site infrastructure, trailers, motor vehicles, party and event equipment, traffic safety materials and other equipment.
ii.2_2: Rental Enquiry: Rental enquiries can be submitted via the contact form, by e-mail or by telephone. The contract is only concluded upon written confirmation by SLT.
ii.2_3: Proof of Identity: SLT is entitled to request presentation of a valid ID card or passport before handover.
ii.2_4: Prices: All prices are gross final prices including the statutory value-added tax, unless otherwise stated.
ii.2_5: Rent Due Date: The right to payment of the full rent arises at the start of the rental period.
ii.2_6: Deposit: SLT is entitled to require a deposit for certain rental items. The deposit amount is shown in the offer or booking process.
ii.2_7: Sub-letting: Transfer to third parties and export from Germany is prohibited without written permission.
ii.2_8: Liability Reduction: A liability reduction and/or insurance can be optionally agreed during the booking process.
ii.2_9: Transport Services: Transport services can be arranged for a separate fee.
ii.2_10: Cash Payments: Cash payments exceeding EUR 1,000 are subject to a 3% surcharge.
ii.2_11: Default Interest: In case of payment default, the interest rate is 5 percentage points above the base rate for consumers and 9 percentage points above the base rate for businesses.

iii.title: III. Handover, Return and Condition of Rental Item
iii.3_1: Handover Location: Handover takes place at one of SLT's business premises (Krefeld, Bonn or Mülheim an der Ruhr).
iii.3_1a: Contactless Handover: Trailers can be handed over contactlessly using a code system.
iii.3_2: Condition Check: Upon handover, the lessee must inspect the condition, completeness and functionality.
iii.3_3: Lessee's Obligations: The lessee is obliged to treat the rental item with care and use it as intended.
iii.3_4: Reporting Obligation: Damage must be reported to SLT in writing immediately, no later than within 24 hours.
iii.3_5: Return: The item must be returned at the agreed time in proper, complete and clean condition.
iii.3_6: Cleaning: Trailers swept clean, construction machinery fully fuelled/charged, tents dry and sorted.
iii.3_7: Return Confirmation: The return is documented with a completion protocol.
iii.3_8: Attachments: Attachments (parts lists, handover protocols, etc.) become part of the contract.
iii.3_9: Loading/Unloading: For self-collection, the lessee is responsible for loading/unloading and load securing.

iv.title: IV. Rental Period, End of Rental and Late Return
iv.4_1: Rental Duration: Rental period and return times are specified in the rental agreement or booking confirmation.
iv.4_2: Rental Price Calculation: 24 hours/day, 8 operating hours/day. Each commenced hour is charged as a full hour.
iv.4_3: End Notification: The lessee must notify the end of rental in writing by e-mail in good time.
iv.4_4: Late Return: A surcharge of 50% of the gross rental price per late day applies.
iv.4_5: Additional Fees: Fines, toll costs, processing fees and cleaning costs are charged separately.

v.title: V. Liability of SLT, Defects, Rights of the Lessee
v.5_1: Limitation of Liability: SLT is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence. For slight negligence, only in case of breach of material contractual obligations.
v.5_2: Defect Notification: Defects must be reported in writing immediately, no later than within 24 hours.

vi.title: VI. Withdrawal and Cancellation by the Lessee
vi.6_1: Cancellation Right: Cancellation before the start of rental is possible at any time by written declaration.
vi.6_2: Cancellation Fees: Up to 20 days: 30%, up to 7 days: 50%, up to 3 days: 70%, up to 48 hours: 90%, thereafter: 100%.
vi.6_3: Proof Reservation: The lessee retains the right to prove a lesser damage.
vi.6_4: Free Cancellation: With the 'Free Cancellation' option, cancellation is free of charge up to 72 hours before rental start.
vi.6_5: Statutory Rights: Statutory withdrawal and warranty rights remain unaffected.

vii.title: VII. Obligations and Liability of the Lessee
vii.7_1: Regulations: The lessee undertakes to comply with all applicable legal regulations.
vii.7_2: Insurance: Insurance of the rental item is the responsibility of the lessee, unless insurance has been taken out through SLT.
vii.7_3: Accident Reporting: In case of accidents, notify the police and SLT immediately and submit a damage report.
vii.7_4: Third-Party Use: Use by third parties and trips abroad only with prior written permission.
vii.7_5: Keys: Keys and accessories must be carefully stored and returned in full upon return.
vii.7_6: Staff: Waiting times are charged at EUR 139.00 gross per hour.
vii.7_7: Machine Insurance: Deductibles per claim as per offer.
vii.7_8: GPS Tracking: Rental equipment may be fitted with a GPS tracking system (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

viii.title: VIII. Setup, Service and Transport
viii.8_1: Setup Location: The lessee is obliged to provide a suitable, clear and accessible setup location.
viii.8_2: Delays: Additional costs due to lack of accessibility or waiting times are borne by the lessee.
viii.8_3: Unforeseen Work: Charged separately based on labour and material documentation.
viii.8_4: Travel Costs: Travel and accommodation costs of SLT employees are charged separately.

ix.title: IX. Special Conditions for Traffic Safety
ix.9_1: Special regulations for traffic safety materials, inspections, battery replacement and official requirements.

x.title: X. Special Conditions for Motor Vehicles
x.10_1: Liability Insurance: Motor vehicle liability insurance with max. EUR 100 million coverage.
x.10_2: Comprehensive Insurance: Optionally available with agreed deductible.
x.10_3: Lapse: In case of intent or gross negligence, insurance cover may lapse.
x.10_4: Without Comprehensive: The lessee is liable up to the replacement value.
x.10_5: Processing Fee: A processing fee may be charged for official information requests.

xi.title: XI. Data Protection, Jurisdiction and Final Provisions
xi.11_1: Data Protection: The privacy policy of SLT at www.slt-rental.de/datenschutz applies.
xi.11_2: Applicable Law: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. The UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods is excluded.
xi.11_3: Jurisdiction: The place of jurisdiction is Krefeld.
xi.11_4: Instruction: Instruction in rental items subject to availability.
xi.11_5: Order Confirmation: Valid with or without signature.
xi.11_6: Side Agreements: Side agreements and amendments must be made in writing.
xi.11_7: Severability Clause: The invalidity of individual provisions does not affect the validity of the remaining provisions.

i.title: I. Scope and Contracting Parties
i.p1: These General Terms and Conditions of Rental ('GTC') apply exclusively to all rental agreements between SLT Technology Group GmbH & Co. KG ('SLT') and the lessee. Conflicting terms and conditions of the lessee are not recognised unless SLT expressly agrees to them in writing.
i.p2: Amendments or deviations from these GTC must be made in writing. The contractual language is German.
i.p3: Should individual provisions of these GTC be invalid, this shall not affect the validity of the remaining provisions. The invalid provision shall be replaced by one that most closely reflects its economic purpose.

ii.title: II. Subject Matter and Conclusion of Contract
ii.2_1: SLT rents out construction machinery, site infrastructure, trailers, motor vehicles, party and event equipment, traffic safety materials and other equipment. All representations on www.slt-rental.de, on social media or in print media are non-binding and subject to change.
ii.2_2a: Rental enquiries can be submitted via the contact form on the website, by e-mail or by telephone. SLT checks availability and submits a binding offer subject to confirmation. The contract is only concluded upon written confirmation by SLT; text form (e-mail) suffices.
ii.2_2b: For online bookings via the web shop at www.slt-rental.de, the contract is deemed concluded upon dispatch of the automated booking confirmation by SLT.
ii.2_3: SLT is entitled to request presentation of a valid ID card or passport as well as a current registration certificate (no older than three months) before handover of the rental item. Rental may be refused if these are not presented; the lessee has no claim for damages in this case.
ii.2_4: All prices are gross final prices including the applicable statutory value-added tax, unless otherwise stated.
ii.2_5: After conclusion of the contract, SLT is obliged to provide and hold the rental items available. The right to payment of the full rent arises at the start of the rental period.
ii.2_6: SLT is entitled to require a deposit for certain rental items. The deposit amount is shown in the offer or booking process and must be paid before handover of the rental item. The deposit is held without interest and refunded within five business days after proper return and inspection of the rental item. SLT is entitled to offset legitimate claims from the rental relationship (in particular rental claims and damage claims due to damage or loss of the rental item) against the deposit.
ii.2_7: Renting, transferring or assigning the rental items to third parties as well as exporting them from the Federal Republic of Germany is prohibited without the express written permission of SLT. In case of violation, the lessee is liable for all resulting damages, costs and fines.
ii.2_8: A liability reduction and/or insurance can be optionally agreed during the booking process. For certain rental items, it is possible to take out a paid foreign liability insurance; the insurance conditions are available on request.
ii.2_9a: Transport services (delivery, collection, round-trip transport) can be arranged for a separate fee. Transport costs are due no later than the start of the rental; payment is deemed acceptance of the arrangement.
ii.2_9b: If round-trip transport has been commissioned, we assume a freely accessible construction site. Should delays occur that are not attributable to SLT (e.g. lack of accessibility, waiting times), we reserve the right to charge for these. Partial collections are charged separately.
ii.2_10: Cash payments exceeding EUR 1,000 are subject to a surcharge of 3% of the payment amount to cover the increased internal processing and security costs.
ii.2_11: In case of payment default, the default interest rate is 5 percentage points above the base rate for consumers and 9 percentage points above the base rate for businesses. The lessee also bears all costs arising from the default (dunning fees, collection costs, lawyer fees).

iii.title: III. Handover, Return and Condition of Rental Item
iii.3_1: Handover takes place at the agreed start of rental at one of SLT's business premises (Krefeld, Bonn or Muelheim an der Ruhr), unless otherwise agreed in writing. Shipping or delivery is arranged by individual agreement and for a separate fee.
iii.3_1a: Trailers can be handed over and returned contactlessly by prior arrangement using a code system. The access code is valid exclusively for the agreed rental period. The lessee is obliged to notify SLT in writing of delays or a necessary extension of the rental period in good time, at least 2 hours before the end of rental. If no timely notification is given, SLT reserves the right to charge for the additional rental time and any additional costs. The codes are sent by SMS to the mobile number provided by the lessee during the booking process. By entering their mobile number in the booking process, the lessee expressly consents to receiving SMS for the purpose of processing the rental relationship.
iii.3_2: Upon handover, the lessee must inspect the condition, completeness and functionality of the rental item. Acceptance by signing the delivery note or handover protocol is deemed acknowledgement of the proper condition of the rental item.
iii.3_3_title: 3.3 Lessee's Obligations in Handling the Rental Item
iii.3_3: The lessee is obliged to treat the rental item and accessories with care and use them as intended and in accordance with applicable safety and operating regulations. The operating instructions must be followed and the rental item must be used as intended.
iii.3_4: Damage, malfunctions or losses must be reported to SLT in writing immediately, no later than within 24 hours of discovery. In case of failure to report or late reporting, the lessee is liable for all resulting consequential damages.
iii.3_5a: The return must be made at the agreed time, generally at one of SLT's business premises (Krefeld, Bonn or Muelheim an der Ruhr), in proper, complete and clean condition. If collected by SLT, the rental item must be ready for transport at ground level.
iii.3_5b: Returns outside business hours are only possible by written agreement. The risk of loss and damage remains with the lessee until actual acceptance by SLT.
iii.3_6_intro: The rental item must be returned as follows:
3_6_items: Construction machinery, generators, aerial platforms: fully fuelled or fully charged, free of heavy dirt
iii.3_6b: If the rental item is returned late, incomplete or dirty, SLT is entitled to charge for the additional effort (in particular cleaning, disinfection and additional rental fees).
iii.3_6c: Cleaning, disposal and transport are charged based on actual effort unless a flat rate has been agreed. Repairs attributable to damage caused by the lessee are at the lessee's expense.
iii.3_7: The return is documented with a completion protocol. Without a protocol, the return is deemed not to have taken place and the rental item remains in the lessee's area of responsibility.
iii.3_8: Attachments (e.g. parts lists, handover protocols, measurements, delivery notes) become part of the contract.
iii.3_9: If collection and/or return delivery by the lessee or by a carrier/freight forwarder commissioned by the lessee is agreed, the lessee is responsible for proper loading and unloading and compliance with the relevant load securing regulations.

iv.title: IV. Rental Period, End of Rental and Late Return
iv.4_1: The rental period and collection and return times are specified in the rental agreement or booking confirmation.
iv.4_2_title: 4.2 Rental Price Calculation and Usage Duration
iv.4_2: Rental prices are based on a daily usage duration of 24 hours or a weekly usage of 168 hours. For machines with hour meters, 8 operating hours per day or 56 per week apply. Each commenced rental or operating hour is charged as a full hour; each commenced rental day is charged as a full day. Each excess is charged at 1/8 of the daily price per additional hour.
iv.4_3: For rental agreements not concluded via the online shop, the rental period stated in the offer is initially only a non-binding planning assumption. The lessee is obliged to notify the end of rental or the release of rental items in a timely and binding manner in writing by e-mail to mieten@slt-rental.de. If no written release notification is given, the rental continues until the actual return and is charged accordingly.
iv.4_4: In case of late return, SLT is entitled to charge a surcharge of 50% of the gross rental price per late day. SLT reserves the right to claim higher, specifically incurred damages; the lessee may provide evidence of lesser damage.
iv.4_5_intro: In addition to the rent, the following items are charged:
4_5_items: Fees, fines and toll costs incurred during the rental period;
a processing fee of EUR 15.00 per instance for fines/tolls;
a processing fee of EUR 40.00 per damage case;
cleaning costs from EUR 50.00 net if the return requirements (see III.6) are not met.
iv.4_5_outro: The lessee retains the right to prove lesser costs.

v.title: V. Liability of SLT, Defects, Rights of the Lessee
v.5_1a: SLT is liable without limitation for intent and gross negligence as well as for injury to life, body or health. For slight negligence, SLT is only liable in the event of a breach of material contractual obligations (so-called cardinal obligations); liability is limited to the typically foreseeable damage.
v.5_1b: For entrepreneurs and public-law entities, liability for slight negligence is excluded unless a cardinal obligation has been breached.
v.5_1c: The limitations of liability also apply in favour of SLT's legal representatives, employees and vicarious agents.
v.5_1d: Liability under the Product Liability Act remains unaffected.
v.5_2: The lessee must report defects of the rental item in writing immediately, no later than within 24 hours of discovery. SLT is entitled to remedy the defect at its discretion by repair or replacement delivery. Further rights of the lessee (e.g. reduction, withdrawal) only exist if repair or replacement delivery definitively fails.

vi.title: VI. Withdrawal and Cancellation by the Lessee
vi.6_1: The lessee may cancel the rental agreement at any time before the start of rental by written declaration (text form suffices) to SLT ('Cancellation').
vi.6_2_intro: In the event of cancellation, SLT may claim liquidated damages calculated as follows (as a percentage of the agreed total rental price), subject to evidence of lesser or greater damage under Section 6.3:
6_2_items: up to 20 days before rental start: 30%
up to 7 days before rental start: 50%
up to 3 days before rental start: 70%
up to 48 hours before rental start: 90%
vi.6_3: The lessee expressly retains the right to prove that SLT has suffered no or significantly less damage (e.g. through alternative rental, saved setup/dismantling, transport or personnel costs). Conversely, SLT retains the right to prove higher, specifically incurred damage.
vi.6_4: When booking the paid 'Free Cancellation' option, the lessee may cancel free of charge up to 72 hours before the start of rental. Cancellation after this point is subject to the cancellation fees under Section 6.2.
vi.6_5: The lessee's statutory withdrawal, termination and warranty rights remain unaffected.

vii.title: VII. Obligations and Liability of the Lessee
vii.7_1a: The lessee undertakes to comply with all applicable statutory and official regulations (in particular accident prevention regulations, road traffic regulations, driving licence requirements, operational safety regulations) and to obtain all necessary permits and approvals.
vii.7_1b: The lessee is fully liable for violations of statutory regulations and indemnifies SLT against all third-party claims.
vii.7_2: Insurance of the rental item is the responsibility of the lessee unless insurance has been taken out through SLT. For some rental items (e.g. trailers with liability insurance, power generators) insurance cover exists; the insurance conditions can be viewed on request.
vii.7_3: In the event of accidents, loss, theft or damage, the lessee must immediately notify the police and SLT and submit a damage report. The lessee must not acknowledge third-party claims without first informing SLT.
vii.7_4: Use of the rental item by third parties and trips abroad are only permitted with prior written permission from SLT.
vii.7_5: Keys, accessories and supplied documents must be carefully stored and returned in full upon return. Loss will be charged to the lessee at actual replacement cost.
vii.7_6_title: 7.6 Staff or Machine Rental with Operating Personnel
vii.7_6: The lessee is also liable for loss, damage and waiting times when staff are deployed, insofar as these are not attributable to SLT. Waiting times are charged at EUR 139.00 gross per hour. Times during which the lessee keeps SLT's specialists waiting while the agreed service cannot be performed are deemed waiting times.
vii.7_7a: If the lessee takes out machine insurance through SLT, the deductibles per claim stated in the offer apply. Certain risks (e.g. glass breakage, tyre damage, driving without the required official permit) may be excluded from insurance cover; details are set out in the insurance conditions, which will be provided to the lessee on request.
vii.7_7b: If the lessee takes out their own insurance, it must at minimum cover damage under the applicable conditions (e.g. ABMG 2008) as well as damage due to loss. Insurance cover must be demonstrated to SLT on request.
vii.7_8: Rental equipment may be fitted with a GPS tracking system. The data transmitted to SLT is processed for recording technical operating conditions, remote monitoring, theft prevention and location tracking in case of loss. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR. Further data protection information is contained in the privacy policy at www.slt-rental.de/datenschutz.

viii.title: VIII. Setup, Service and Transport
viii.8_1: When renting with service or setup services, the lessee is obliged to provide a suitable, clear and accessible setup location and to create all necessary conditions for safe and quick execution.
viii.8_2a: The lessee bears the costs for delays or additional effort not attributable to SLT (e.g. lack of accessibility, waiting times, necessary additional staff, required clarifications).
viii.8_2b: SLT is not obliged to inspect the setup location for suitability before the start of the contract. The responsibility for this lies with the lessee.
viii.8_3: Unforeseen work not covered by the agreed scope of services (e.g. additional setup and dismantling, waiting times, rework at the lessee's request) is charged separately based on labour and material documentation. The basis is SLT's current billing rates, in particular for service technicians and specialised professionals; these can be viewed on request.
viii.8_4: Travel, accommodation and subsistence costs of SLT employees are charged separately and are to be borne by the lessee.

ix.title: IX. Special Conditions for Traffic Safety and Traffic Engineering
ix.9_1: In the event of changes or specifications to the traffic regulation order or execution planning, SLT is entitled to adjust the offer accordingly. In case of an order, billing is based on actual quantities and delivery notes.
ix.9_2a: Checking the completeness of signage, barriers and lighting after work, implementing special regulations for non-working hours, multiple daily cleaning of traffic safety materials as required, and securing the core construction site including necessary ramps are the responsibility of the client, unless expressly agreed otherwise in writing.
ix.9_2b: For longer-duration work sites, the client must carry out daily inspections at least twice daily (at dawn and after nightfall) in accordance with ZTV-SA; on non-working days at least once daily. After storms or severe weather, inspections must be carried out immediately. Daily inspection runs by SLT can be separately commissioned on request.
ix.9_3: The traffic safety materials provided remain the property of SLT. Rental billing is monthly if the rental period exceeds one month, but no later than after 90 days. The rental is automatically extended until written deregistration by the client. Deregistration or dismantling must be announced in writing at least 72 hours before the planned dismantling date.
ix.9_4: Battery replacement on lights and other battery-powered equipment must be carried out at least every 14 days. The client can commission battery replacement and site inspection as an additional service.
ix.9_5: If additional materials or blocking measures are required due to official requirements or approval conditions, these will be offered and charged separately.
ix.9_6: Damage or losses of rental materials during the rental period are at the expense of the client, even if SLT carries out on-site inspection or monitoring.
ix.9_7: Fees and charges of authorities are - unless expressly stated otherwise - not included in the offer and are billed separately.

x.title: X. Special Conditions for Motor Vehicle Rental
x.10_1: The rented vehicle has motor vehicle liability insurance with a maximum coverage of EUR 100 million for personal injury and property damage and a maximum coverage of EUR 12 million per injured person. Insurance cover is limited to the European area.
x.10_2: The lessee can take out comprehensive cover (including theft protection) with an agreed deductible for a separate fee. By taking out comprehensive cover, the lessee's liability for accident damage or loss of the vehicle is reduced to the agreed deductible. A further reduction of the deductible is possible in accordance with the respective offer.
x.10_3: In the event of intentional or grossly negligent damage or serious breaches of rental agreement obligations, the entitlement to comprehensive and theft protection may lapse in whole or in part.
x.10_4: If no comprehensive cover (incl. theft protection) is agreed, the lessee is liable for all damage to the rental vehicle not demonstrably caused by third parties, up to the replacement value plus further recoverable damages (e.g. diminished value, expert costs, wear costs).
x.10_5: For processing official information requests in connection with traffic and administrative offences, legal violations or other allegations, SLT may charge lessees who are not consumers within the meaning of Section 13 BGB a reasonable processing fee. The amount is stated in the respective rental agreement.

xi.title: XI. Data Protection, Jurisdiction and Final Provisions
xi.11_1: The privacy policy of SLT, available at www.slt-rental.de/datenschutz, applies additionally. SLT also processes personal data of responsible contacts of business partners within the scope of the business relationship.
xi.11_2: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies to all disputes arising from or in connection with the rental relationship. The UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods is excluded.
xi.11_3: The place of jurisdiction is - to the extent legally permissible - the registered office of SLT in Krefeld. For contracts with consumers, the statutory places of jurisdiction under Section 29 BGB apply.
xi.11_4: Instruction in the operation and handling of rental items is provided subject to availability.
xi.11_5: Order confirmations are sent to the lessee and should be reviewed. The document is valid with or without signature.
xi.11_6: Side agreements and amendments to these GTC and the rental agreement must be made in writing. This also applies to the waiver of this written form requirement.
xi.11_7: Should individual provisions of these GTC be or become wholly or partially invalid, this shall not affect the validity of the remaining provisions. The invalid provision shall be replaced by a valid provision that most closely reflects its economic purpose.

werkzeuge.desc: Professional cordless and electric tools from Bosch, Eibenstock and Einhell for construction, renovation and trades. All cordless tools include battery and charger.

gartenpflege.desc: Garden equipment for professionals and DIY enthusiasts. From chainsaws to earth augers – everything for your garden.

aggregate.desc: Reliable power supply for construction sites, events or emergencies. From small battery packs to powerful industrial generators.

arbeitsbuehnen.desc: Safe work at height with our electric aerial platforms. All platforms are instructed and suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
arbeitsbuehnen.highlightText: As an official Zoomlion authorised dealer, we offer first-class aerial platforms with full service.

verdichtung.desc: Professional soil compaction with rammers and plate compactors for paving, trenches and foundation preparation.

heizung.desc: Heaters and construction dryers for shell construction, renovation and events. Efficient solutions for warmth and dehumidification.

leitern.desc: Safe ladders and mobile scaffolding for working at height. TÜV-tested and regularly maintained.

beleuchtung.desc: Professional lighting for events, construction sites and venues. From LED floodlights to stage lighting.

beschallung.desc: PA systems and sound equipment for events, conferences and celebrations – from complete setups to individual microphones.

moebelZelte.desc: Event furniture and tents for your event. Beer garden sets, standing tables, party tents and lounge furniture.

geschirr.desc: Tableware, glasses and cutlery for your event. High-quality, washed and packed transport-ready in crates.

huepfburgen.desc: Inflatable bouncy castles and games for children's parties, corporate events and celebrations.

absperrtechnik.desc: Traffic signs, construction fences, warning barriers and complete traffic safety – incl. planning and applications for no-parking zones.
absperrtechnik.highlightText: We handle complete planning of your traffic safety – incl. no-parking zones, authority applications and setup.

spezialeffekte.desc: Impressive special effects for unforgettable events. Fog, bubbles, sparks and more.

kabel.desc: Extension cables, power distributors and cable bridges for safe power supply at your event.

buehne.desc: Stage elements and platforms for professional performances. Nivtec systems for flexible stage design.

traversen.desc: Trusses and rigging equipment for professional stage constructions. Milos trusses in black.

kommunikation.desc: Walkie-talkies for events, construction sites and venues. Reliable communication for your team.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We don't just offer top-quality rental equipment – we also provide the complete service package, from planning to dismantling.
services.planningDesc: We handle complete project planning – from needs assessment to coordination with authorities and building offices.
services.trafficDesc: Barrier planning, setting up no-parking zones, application forms and full coordination with traffic authorities.
services.setupDesc: Professional setup and dismantling of tents, stages, furniture, barrier equipment and more – all from a single source.
services.deliveryDesc: Flexible delivery directly to your construction site or event venue throughout NRW.
